input_assumptions.current_content_strategy: Short-form video-first, broad-topic posting, limited explicit testing of recommendation controls and search-intent packaging.

limitation_statement: This is the limitation I ran up against: algorithm shifts are changing discovery mechanics faster than the current posting playbook is adapting.
challenge_objective: So, this is the challenge we will overcome: run a platform-specific adaptation loop that updates format, metadata, and feedback signals every 2 weeks based on confirmed changes.

algorithm_findings.change_summary: TikTok introduced stronger feed-personalization controls (Manage Topics and AI-powered Smart Keyword Filters), reinforcing user feedback and preference signals in recommendation shaping.
algorithm_findings.strategy_impact: Content must be more clearly topical and context-labeled so it is favored in user-tuned feeds; weak topic clarity will lose distribution.

algorithm_findings.change_summary: Instagram leadership emphasized improving content search and expanded user control over Reels recommendations (reported by major tech press).
algorithm_findings.strategy_impact: Discovery is less purely follower-graph driven; keyword-rich packaging, comment-context relevance, and recommendation eligibility hygiene are more important.

algorithm_findings.change_summary: YouTube rolled out AI search/discovery experiences and expanded auto-dubbing reach across more languages.
algorithm_findings.strategy_impact: Search-intent framing and multilingual accessibility now have larger upside for recommendation expansion.

strategy_adjustments.recommendation: Refactor content calendar into platform-native intent buckets (educate, compare, react, utility) and tag each asset with one primary topic only.
strategy_adjustments.justification: Both TikTok and Instagram are tightening discovery around clearer topic and personalization signals.
strategy_adjustments.kpi: Non-follower reach per post, save/share rate, search-sourced views

strategy_adjustments.recommendation: Adopt a metadata standard: title hook + 3 search-intent keywords + explicit on-screen topic phrase in first 3 seconds.
strategy_adjustments.justification: Improved search layers on Instagram and YouTube reward clearer content-query matching.
strategy_adjustments.kpi: Impressions from search, average view duration from search traffic

strategy_adjustments.recommendation: Build a biweekly algorithm adaptation sprint: test 2 variants per platform (hook style, length band, CTA type) and promote only winners.
strategy_adjustments.justification: Algorithm behavior is shifting; static best-practice playbooks decay quickly.
strategy_adjustments.kpi: Lift in reach per impression, completion rate, send/share rate

strategy_adjustments.recommendation: Optimize for recommendation hygiene: avoid cross-platform watermarking, strengthen originality, maintain account-status compliance checks.
strategy_adjustments.justification: Recommendation eligibility friction suppresses distribution even when engagement is strong.
strategy_adjustments.kpi: Recommendation eligibility incidents, content suppression flags

strategy_adjustments.recommendation: Pilot localization workflow for top 10% videos (captions + dubbed versions where supported).
strategy_adjustments.justification: YouTube's expanded auto-dubbing increases discoverability beyond primary-language audience.

monitoring_plan.cadence: Weekly signal review, biweekly strategy adjustments, monthly retrospective
decision_rules: If non-follower reach drops >20% week-over-week for 2 weeks, trigger rapid format test sprint.
If shares/sends outperform baseline by >25%, replicate concept in 3 new topic variants.
If search impressions grow but retention falls, tighten hook-to-promise match.
